name: An-Ja
description:
Oops I made an Argonian bot. Argonians are probably my favourite fictional race, or among them at least. I felt like making one particularly because I feel like I've always needed to. And because they're awesome. I wish there were more marriage candidates for the Argonians. But I am not upset at all given how Khajiit fans got absolutely scammed with no marriage candidates. Rip. Personally, my favourite Argonian is my boy Derkeethus. What a hot man he is. May or may not make a bot for him down the road.

Also just a question, why are all the bots on this site no longer using italics? It's quite jarring. If anyone could let me know what that's about, it'd be appreciated.

Anyway, as usual, please leave your suggestions and feedback and whatever else you want and I'll always read it and respond!

Artist: Blazbaros
creator: Meessaa
